subject: [PATCH 4/8] mm/zsmalloc: Store obj_cgroup pointer in zpdesc

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's impact on zswap and zram layers, specifically questioning whether the obj_cgroup pointer should be stored in zpdesc. Suggested that the lifetime and charging of the obj_cgroup is still handled in the zswap layer.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series introduces changes to the zsmalloc memory management system, specifically adding support for object cgroups (obj_cgroup) in the zpdesc structure. The obj_cgroup pointer is stored in the zpdesc and helper functions are introduced to abstract the conversion of an object's zspage index to its zpdesc index and retrieval of the obj_cgroup pointer from the zpdesc.
